newsSince: No material new AI-chain news since June 9. Activity is limited to routine share-buyback/liquidity-agreement prints (early June) and the previously-known CEO change (Olivier Biebuyck, effective June 1) plus the earlier Bridgestone tire-cord acquisition (Jan 2026). Nothing touches the latent steel-wire-to-electrification pathway.

verdicts.rankRationale: Hold rank 59. No new AI-chain evidence since June 9; flat price (0% move). The latent steel-wire-to-electrification/enclosure pathway is unchanged and remains speculative on the strict lens - no fundamental development to move the node.
verdicts.bull: Advanced steel wire/reinforcement could ride electrification, enclosures and industrial construction build-out.
verdicts.neutral: Genuine but distant AI link; mostly a cyclical industrial materials story.
verdicts.bear: Tire-reinforcement/steel-ropes pressure and weak demand dilute any AI-adjacent thesis.
verdicts.primaryRisk: Competitive pressure and commodity cyclicality; AI link too tenuous.
